puzzle.title: The Builder of Barriers
puzzle.intro: Across vast lands, a powerful individual embarked on a series of expeditions, granted immense authority and means. This soul encountered diverse communities and faced unique challenges, leaving a lasting mark on history and faith through their actions and wisdom, all while acknowledging the true source of their strength.
clues: I was granted power and means over everything, and I followed a way.
My journey took me to the setting place of the sun, where I found a people.
I encountered a community who could barely understand speech, residing between two mountains.
I was asked to build a barrier, not for personal gain, but to protect against a destructive force.
I declared that the strength to build this massive wall came from Allah, and it would stand until a promised time.
My name, often translated as 'The Two-Horned One,' signifies my reach across the earth or perhaps two distinct eras.
puzzle.arabic: قَالَ مَا مَكَّنِّى فِيهِ رَبِّى خَيْرٌۭ فَأَعِينُونِى بِقُوَّةٍ أَجْعَلْ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَهُمْ رَدْمًا
puzzle.verse: He said, "That in which my Lord has established me is better [than what you offer], but assist me with strength [i.e., manpower]; I will make between you and them a dam. (18:95)
